title: Alsinella rubra
taxonomy: Alsinella rubra is a member of the plant family Primulaceae, which is a group of flowering plants commonly known as the primrose family. This family is part of the order Ericales, a larger group of flowering plants that also includes heathers and blueberries. The order Ericales is a part of the class Magnoliopsida, which includes most of the flowering plants that have flowers with three or more petals. The class Magnoliopsida is part of the division Magnoliophyta, which includes all flowering plants. The division Magnoliophyta is a subgroup of the kingdom Plantae, the largest group of organisms on Earth.
